description: Style Note Well fitted women's trousers are just what you need to complete your formal wear wardrobe. With this pair from arrow you'll never go wrong with fashionable styling. Pair them with a formal, long sleeved, light coloured shirt and formal pumps to get yourself a makeover for your office. Product Details Dark olive green pair of trousers with a button and zipped closure, loops for a belt around the waistband and a brand patch at the back of your waistband, two patch pockets at the back, two insert pockets in front with a diagonal opening and a small coin pocket within the right pocket Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% lycra Machine wash using a mild detergent with like colours  Do not bleach  Do not dry in direct sunlight  Tumble dry low  Use warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 5'8&rdquo and waist 28&rdquo ) is wearing a size 28 Style NoteWell fitted women's trousers are just what you need to complete your formal wear wardrobe. With this pair from Arrow you'll never go wrong with fashionable styling.
